title: Daily Tasks on iphone widget
excerpt: I like to use the larger widgets on my iphone to show important data for the day.  would there be a way to make a larger widget for the iphone to display maybe daily tasks on your homescreen?  If you look at click up’s w…

posts.author: Colson (Cathleen Olson)
posts.cookedHtml: I like to use the larger widgets on my iphone to show important data for the day. would there be a way to make a larger widget for the iphone to display maybe daily tasks on your homescreen? If you look at click up’s widget options for the iphone they have a nice widget that summarizes your daily tasks for the day as well as add an item right from the widget.

posts.author: Hammertime (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely would love to see this as an iOS home screen widget. If you could surface all incomplete tasks in “My Work” sorted by due date that would be a really nice way to have visibility into those things at a glance.
